name: IRC_TP_EVENT_LOGS
description: This table logs inbound and outbound REST calls between thrid party partner integrations and Oracle Recruiting Cloud.

columns.Name: EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: DIRECTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the direction of request. (INBOUND or OUTBOUND)

columns.Name: RESOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of REST invocation.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the name of REST resource.

columns.Name: METHOD
columns.Comments: Stores HTTP method of the request.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores HTTP status of the response.

columns.Name: PHASE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores code identifying the category phase to which the service belongs.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the code for thrid party category.

columns.Name: PROVISIONING_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies partner provisioning. Foreign Key to IRC_TP_PARTNER_PROVISNGS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_URL
columns.Comments: Stores the path of REST resource.

columns.Name: REQUEST_HEADERS
columns.Comments: Stores all request headers from the request.

columns.Name: PAYLOAD_IN
columns.Comments: Stores input payload from the request.

columns.Name: PAYLOAD_OUT
columns.Comments: Stores output  payload from the response.

columns.Name: STATUS_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Stores HTTP status message of the response.

columns.Name: REQUEST_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Stores request start time

columns.Name: REQUEST_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Stores request end time

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
